note: Condition-level design-time screen — NOT a named strategy candidate (per project convention: only strategies are named, conditions are referred to by type). The future strategy assembled around this condition (entry stack + short-hold exit) gets the name, not the bare alpha engine.
premise: Does orderBlockBreakout(2,5,0) — price breaking above a recently-mitigated bearish OB and holding — carry standalone forward-return lift, decoupled from Tyr's marketBreadthRecovering AND that starved N to ~17 dates/yr? Event-trigger form of VCP's order-block alpha (vs VCP aboveBearishOrderBlock state filter).
origin: isolated from abandoned Tyr candidate per condition-screen-analyst lead

summary: Only non-rejected condition of the session. Firing 6.11% across 4066 dates (~2.6/date — NOT clustered, unlike Tyr). 5d lift +0.211% (1.84xSE, optimistic on 50-sym universe), decays through ~0 at 10d to NEGATIVE -0.416% at 20d => FRONT-LOADED event edge. hitRateLift positive all horizons (+1.55/+2.00/+1.65pp). REGIME-CONSISTENT: 5d lift same-sign positive across all 3 SPY tertiles (no sign-flip — cleanest of the 4 screens). Negligible fill gap. Sweep no visible ARS but 2/3 tunables degenerate-neighbour + ageInDays fully degenerate (0/0/0) => robustness deferred to firewall G13.
rescreen_requirements: Run FULL production ~3900-symbol universe for honest cross-sectional SE; re-confirm |meanLift|>clusteredSE at 5d or REJECT (1.84x is an upper bound on 50-sym universe).

Supply VCP aboveBearishOrderBlock as Jaccard reference — this is the event-trigger form of the same OB alpha; pooled Jaccard >0.5-0.7 => redundant with VCP, reframe as entry-timing refinement not standalone engine.
Resolve ageInDays degeneracy (0/0/0 unperturbed) — exercise at firewall G13.
exit_design_guidance: FRONT-LOADED: the strategy wrapping this condition needs a short-hold exit (~5d time-stop and/or tight trailing stop). NOT a multi-week / VCP-style hold — 20d lift is negative, a slow exit gives back the entire edge.
next: If pursued: full-universe condition rescreen (above) -> if clean, ASSEMBLE A STRATEGY (this condition as entry trigger + trend/liquidity filters + short-hold exit), NAME THE STRATEGY at that point, register it as a funnel candidate DRAFT, then /strategy-screen.

supersedes: 50-symbol orderBlock-subset FLAG-FOR-FULL-RESCREEN — that positive 5d edge was a stratified-sample + anti-conservative-SE artifact (subset selected on the order-block mechanism the condition trades).
summary: On representative 300-main universe (firing 5.93%, 63032 sig / ~5130 dates — no INCONCLUSIVE): NO detectable lift any horizon — 5d -0.036%/-0.71SE, 10d -0.114%/-1.53SE, 20d -0.066%/-0.56SE, all |lift|<SE, leaning negative. ~12 sig/day (not lumpy), fill gap ~1bp (negligible) => broad, robust flatness. Regime sign-flips at EVERY horizon (incoherent, no salvageable regime gate). hitRateLift mildly + (+0.9/+0.7/+1.0pp) but meanLift - => adverse-skew non-edge (strips right-tail winners, keeps left tail), NOT usable as a filter/refinement. ARS not flagged but sweep weak (integer-floor collapses neighbour cells; ageInDays degenerate).
jaccard_read: LOW (byYear ~0.04-0.10, well below uncalibrated 0.5 band) => structurally DISTINCT from aboveBearishOrderBlock, NOT redundant. But distinct != additive given no standalone edge. (Reference VCP/aboveBearishOrderBlock is itself INVALIDATED — read as structural fire-set overlap only.)
disposition: orderBlockBreakout standalone-entry-trigger hypothesis CLOSED. Design-time condition-screen reject — NOT a firewall death (no config_hash DEAD, no brake). No strategy assembled. Tyr's order-block leg is exhausted as a standalone premise.
tooling_followup: condition-screen parameter sweep: integer tunables floor +1 neighbour onto the center (2.0 & 2.2 -> 2; 5.0 & 5.5 -> 5) and ageInDays=0 sweep is fully degenerate => weak robustness evidence. Consider fixing floor/step logic so integer tunables produce distinct neighbour cells.
